touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Hiroshi Brooks introducing call recording and coaching capabilities for sales teams. No response received.
LinkedIn message sent to Hiroshi Brooks highlighting automation features for sales coaching workflows. No response received.
Follow-up cold email to Hiroshi Brooks with case study from similar enterprise tech company. No response received.
Cold email to Hiroshi Brooks focusing on call recording ROI for sales teams. Hiroshi responded expressing interest in learning more about coaching automation.

questions_asked.question: What makes your coaching automation different from what we're currently evaluating?
questions_asked.answer: Our platform focuses on real-time coaching insights and unlimited automation workflows, not just call recording.

touches.ai_summary: 9-minute qualification call with Hiroshi Brooks. Discussed current sales process pain points and team size. Hiroshi mentioned they're evaluating Clari but interested in alternatives with better automation.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for a call recording and coaching solution right now?
questions_asked.answer: We're scaling our sales team and need better visibility into coaching opportunities and rep performance.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with major CRMs and can discuss your specific setup.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Hiroshi with product overview and ROI calculator. Hiroshi confirmed interest in deeper discovery call and mentioned involving IT team for technical review.
next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Pre-discovery email to Hiroshi with agenda and requesting additional stakeholders join. Hiroshi confirmed Oliver Nkrumah (COO) and Julian Allen (IT Director) would be involved in evaluation.

questions_asked.question: Will we need to make any infrastructure changes to support your platform?
questions_asked.answer: We'll cover technical requirements in detail during the discovery call with your IT team.

touches.ai_summary: 22-minute discovery call with Hiroshi Brooks. Discussed use case for 29 sales reps, need for call recording and automated coaching workflows. Hiroshi shared they're currently using basic tools and evaluating Clari as primary alternative.

questions_asked.question: What specific coaching workflows are most important to automate?
questions_asked.answer: We want automated feedback on objection handling, discovery quality, and deal progression indicators.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to have something in place within 60 days, but need to complete technical evaluation first.

questions_asked.question: How does your unlimited automation compare to Clari's approach?
questions_asked.answer: We don't limit automation workflows by tier - you can build as many custom coaching triggers and alerts as needed.

next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation with Julian Allen

touches.ai_summary: 42-minute technical evaluation call with Julian Allen (IT Director). Reviewed security requirements, data privacy controls, and integration architecture. Julian asked detailed questions about SSO, API limits, and data retention policies.

questions_asked.question: What SOC 2 compliance certifications do you have?
questions_asked.answer: We maintain SOC 2 Type II certification and can provide our latest audit report.

questions_asked.question: How is call data encrypted in transit and at rest?
questions_asked.answer: All data is encrypted using AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit, with key management through AWS KMS.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline for enterprise deployments?
questions_asked.answer: For 29 seats, we typically complete implementation in 2-3 weeks including SSO setup and integrations.

objections: Need to verify API rate limits will support our call volume

touches.ai_summary: 62-minute follow-up technical evaluation with Julian Allen covering API specifications, webhook configurations, and custom integration requirements. Julian confirmed technical requirements can be met but needs written confirmation on SLA terms.

questions_asked.question: What uptime SLA do you guarantee for enterprise customers?
questions_asked.answer: We provide 99.9% uptime SLA for enterprise tier with financial credits for any violations.

questions_asked.question: Can we export all call recordings and metadata if we decide to switch platforms?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full data portability is included - you can export all recordings, transcripts, and metadata via API or bulk download.

questions_asked.question: Are there any remaining technical blockers from your perspective?
questions_asked.answer: No blockers - we just need the SLA terms in writing and confirmation on the API rate limits we discussed.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform handle call recording consent in different jurisdictions?
questions_asked.answer: We support configurable consent workflows by region and can enforce one-party or two-party consent rules automatically.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Hiroshi with technical validation summary from Julian. Confirmed all technical requirements met and ready to move to proposal stage. Hiroshi requested pricing for 29 seats with unlimited automation tier.

Email to Hiroshi with formal proposal for 29 seats at $33,400 ACV (unlimited automation tier). Outlined implementation timeline and support terms. Requested executive sponsor meeting to review business case.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the per-seat pricing if we commit to a multi-year contract?
questions_asked.answer: We can discuss multi-year terms and volume discounts during the proposal review call.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Hiroshi checking on proposal review and executive availability. Hiroshi confirmed Oliver Nkrumah (COO) will join for business case discussion and mentioned Clari is still in consideration.
Email to Hiroshi confirming exec meeting scheduled and requesting agenda items. Sent competitive comparison document highlighting automation advantages over Clari.

22-minute proposal review call with Hiroshi Brooks. Walked through ROI calculation, implementation plan, and pricing structure. Hiroshi expressed concern about budget approval and requested comparison with Clari pricing.

questions_asked.question: What's your budget allocated for this initiative?
questions_asked.answer: We have budget approved but it's competitive with other priorities - need to show clear ROI advantage.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Clari for similar features?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation tier provides more flexibility than Clari's tiered approach, though pricing is competitive at this seat count.

objections: Need to justify pricing premium over alternative solutions to finance team

touches.ai_summary: 43-minute executive meeting with Oliver Nkrumah (COO) and Hiroshi Brooks. Discussed business case for sales coaching automation, expected productivity gains, and strategic alignment. Oliver supportive but wants to understand total implementation cost and ongoing commitment.

questions_asked.question: What productivity improvements have similar companies seen after implementing your platform?
questions_asked.answer: Enterprise customers typically see 15-20% improvement in rep ramp time and 10-15% increase in win rates within 6 months.

questions_asked.question: Beyond licensing, what other costs should we budget for?
questions_asked.answer: Implementation is included, ongoing costs are just the annual subscription - no additional fees for support or updates.

questions_asked.question: What would make this an easy decision from your perspective?
questions_asked.answer: Clear ROI on sales productivity and confidence we're choosing the right long-term platform over alternatives like Clari.

questions_asked.question: What's your customer retention rate for enterprise accounts?
questions_asked.answer: We maintain 95% retention for enterprise customers, with most expanding seat count after the first year.

touches.ai_summary: 13-minute pricing negotiation call with Hiroshi Brooks. Discussed discount options and payment terms. Hiroshi requested 15% discount to match budget constraints and align with competitive offers.

questions_asked.question: What discount can you offer for an annual prepay commitment?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer 8% discount for annual prepay, or discuss multi-year terms for larger discounts.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility to add seats mid-contract as your team grows?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we'd be happy to include a growth clause allowing seat additions at the same per-seat rate.

objections: Budget approved at 15% below proposed pricing - need to close the gap

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Hiroshi with revised proposal including 10% discount for annual prepay plus implementation acceleration. Hiroshi reviewing with finance and Oliver for final approval.

16-minute final pricing call with Hiroshi Brooks. Discussed revised terms and addressed remaining budget questions. Hiroshi confirmed 10% discount meets budget requirements and will recommend moving forward to Oliver and finance team.

questions_asked.question: Can we include a performance review clause at 6 months to evaluate ROI?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - we can build in a quarterly business review process to track metrics and ensure you're seeing expected results.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for getting final signatures?
questions_asked.answer: Should have finance approval this week and can route contracts next week for signatures.
